skillUpdates.description: Use as a lightweight baseline/control skill for making Chinese AI-generated text sound less artificial. Basic version focuses on simple synonym replacement, shorter sentences, and reduced obvious AI phrases with limited structural diagnosis.
skillUpdates.descriptionZh: Use as a lightweight baseline/control skill for making Chinese AI-generated text sound less artificial. Basic version focuses on simple synonym replacement, shorter sentences, and reduced obvious AI phrases with limited structural diagnosis.

skillUpdates.description: Use when rewriting Chinese articles to remove AI-style writing traces while preserving meaning, factual boundaries, author voice, rhythm, and information density. Pro version focuses on diagnosis, structural editing, natural phrasing, evidence discipline, and publication-ready prose.
skillUpdates.descriptionZh: Use when rewriting Chinese articles to remove AI-style writing traces while preserving meaning, factual boundaries, author voice, rhythm, and information density. Pro version focuses on diagnosis, structural editing, natural phrasing, evidence discipline, and publication-ready prose.

skillUpdates.description: 根据一句话主题、Markdown 或已有文稿生成结构化 PPT，并支持自然语言修改页面与组件后导出为可编辑 PPT。适用于需要生成大纲、创建逐页布局、维护 deck.json、渲染 HTML 预览和导出 .pptx 的场景。
skillUpdates.descriptionZh: 根据一句话主题、Markdown 或已有文稿生成结构化 PPT，并支持自然语言修改页面与组件后导出为可编辑 PPT。适用于需要生成大纲、创建逐页布局、维护 deck.json、渲染 HTML 预览和导出 .pptx 的场景。

skillUpdates.description: Use when the task is to design a management console, 管理后台, admin panel, operations dashboard, moderation tool, or back-office web app. Focus on operator efficiency, table-first layout, filters, bulk actions, status visibility, and low-noise product UI.

Pro version focused on strategic positioning, visual direction, section narrative, conversion paths, responsive polish, and implementation-ready design details.

skillUpdates.description: Use as a lightweight baseline/control skill for creating a simple development plan or implementation outline. Basic version focuses on high-level steps, rough files, and validation notes with limited repository research and limited method/type-level detail.
skillUpdates.descriptionZh: Use as a lightweight baseline/control skill for creating a simple development plan or implementation outline. Basic version focuses on high-level steps, rough files, and validation notes with limited repository research and limited method/type-level detail.

skillUpdates.description: Use when creating a serious engineering implementation plan after repository research. Pro version requires investigation before planning and produces a detailed plan down to modules, functions, type definitions, interfaces, data flow, validation, risks, rollout, and task checklist.
skillUpdates.descriptionZh: Use when creating a serious engineering implementation plan after repository research.
